reasoning: The original Vision Pro launched in February 2024. Most reliable Apple analysts (e.g., Ming-Chi Kuo, Mark Gurman) projected early on that a true second-generation Vision Pro would not launch until 2026 or later, with Apple prioritizing a cheaper, stripped-down 'Apple Vision' for late 2025. This cheaper version would not qualify under the resolution criteria, which demand that an unnumbered successor retain and expand upon the original's capabilities. Furthermore, Apple's major product unveilings typically occur by October at the latest. A new flagship hardware release in December, without an earlier announcement, is highly unprecedented for the company. Given these factors, a release prior to the end of 2025 is extremely unlikely.
